mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_task (id, instance_id, task_name, task_type, assignee_id, status, comment, handle_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{instanceId}, #{taskName}, #{taskType}, #{assigneeId}, #{status}, #{comment}, #{handleTime}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted}, #{version})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wf_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE wf_task SET instance_id = #{instanceId}, task_name = #{taskName}, task_type = #{taskType}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, status = #{status}, comment = #{comment}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE wf_task SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
